name: Nae Tennouji
description:
[Tennouji Yuugo's](https://anilist.co/character/38558) only daughter, in grade school. Really loves her father, and often shows up at the CRT TV Workshop on the way home from school. She's a bit docile. Thinks of Mayuri as her "older sister", but is often frightened by Itaru and Rintarou.  

On [__Robotics;Notes__](https://anilist.co/anime/13599/RoboticsNotes/) Nae returns in Robotics;Notes as an important member of the cast and while not part of the Robot Research Club she provides assistance to them via ties at her job at JAXA (Japan Aerospace Exploration Agency)
